prompt: A soft flat-color anime illustration of a cute elf girl lounging sideways on a frilly bed in a pastel bedroom, with the composition weighted to the left and a large area of empty cream-colored negative space on the right. She has long slightly tousled bright orange hair, large vivid blue eyes, pale skin, and one clearly visible pointed elf ear decorated with a red flower hair clip. Her expression is gentle, shy, and relaxed, with a faint blush, as she rests her cheek against her hands and curls her body slightly on the bed. She wears a romantic off-shoulder sage green dress with abundant white lace trim, floral embroidery, and 4 small red ribbon bows visible on the dress, paired with black bloomers with 1 red bow visible and white ankle socks with a tiny pink bow detail. The bed has a white ruffled pillow, pink cushions including a round frilled cushion, and a beige bunny plush toy with a pink ribbon sitting near her legs. In the background, show a small bedside table with 1 potted plant, 1 framed photo, and 1 lamp with a fabric shade, plus wall decor consisting of 1 hanging floral ornament and 2 small framed pictures. Scatter a few tiny pastel hearts and flower motifs across the empty right side. Use a delicate clean lineart style, muted pastel palette, very light beige background, flat coloring with minimal shading, airy and sweet shoujo mood, cozy bedroom aesthetic, high detail in frills and fabric, landscape format.
